title: Multi-omic single-cell velocity models epigenome-transcriptome interactions and improves cell fate prediction
topic_relevance: chromatin accessibility c(t)를 RNA velocity ODE에 넣어 chromatin-transcription lag, priming, decoupling을 처음으로 정량화한 foundational reference.
research_question: RNA-only velocity가 놓치는 chromatin priming과 chromatin-transcription decoupling을 paired multiome data에서 어떻게 mechanistic ODE로 모델링할 것인가?
method: 3-ODE model dc/dt, du/dt, ds/dt + EM latent time inference + gene state classification primed/coupled-on/decoupled/coupled-off + M1/M2 model selection.
main_claims: chromatin accessibility를 transcription rate의 time-varying regulator로 넣으면 RNA-only velocity의 backflow와 priming 미포착 문제를 줄인다.
gene별 chromatin closing과 transcription repression의 순서를 M1/M2로 나누어 functional class와 연결할 수 있다.
TF expression, motif accessibility, disease SNP accessibility, linked gene expression 사이 lag를 latent time에서 정량할 수 있다.
key_results: Mouse skin: MultiVelo latent time vs Palantir Spearman 0.51 vs scVelo 0.44 (core.md Results Dataset 2).
Mouse brain variable genes 865개: induction-only 29.5%, repression-only 2.4%, M1 41.4%, M2 26.7% (core.md Fig. 2h).
Mouse brain median priming interval 21%, decoupling interval 19% of total time (core.md Results Dataset 1).
Simulation: 985/1000 genes likelihood-based correct model assignment, 95.8% top-quantile count assignment (core.md Methods/Results).
limitations: 저자 명시: TF lag mechanism은 association이며 causal mechanism은 추가 data 없이는 확정 불가 (lens-academic.md Limitations).
해석: single c per gene으로 promoter/enhancer별 kinetics를 분리하지 못한다.
해석: MultiVelo는 transcriptional boost와 simultaneous emergence of distinct cell types를 해결하지 못한다고 저자가 명시했다.
해석: 정량 benchmark가 일부 dataset에 제한되고, 많은 trajectory 개선은 backflow 정성 비교에 의존한다.
follow_up: 우리 HSPC multiome에서 MultiVelo discrete M1/M2 state를 재현하고 cell-cycle confound를 phase별로 점검한다.
per-enhancer kinetics 또는 peak-level lag로 single c aggregation 한계를 보완한다.
perturb-seq/CRISPRi로 TF-motif lag와 M1/M2 functional claim을 causal validation한다.

title: Inferring differential dynamics from multi-lineage, multi-omic, and multi-sample single-cell data with MultiVeloVAE
topic_relevance: MultiVelo의 discrete state, single-sample, gene-specific time 한계를 continuous cell-specific factors, shared latent time, cVAE multi-sample inference, Bayesian differential test로 확장한 핵심 후속 method.
research_question: multi-lineage, multi-sample, partially overlapping modality setting에서 chromatin-RNA dynamics와 differential velocity를 하나의 probabilistic framework로 추정할 수 있는가?
assay_or_data: BMMC scRNA + HSPC multiome mixed mode
method: conditional VAE + ODE decoder; cell-specific continuous kc and rho; shared latent time t; batch-specific theta_b; Bayesian differential dynamics test; mixed RNA-only/multi-omic mode.
main_claims: MultiVelo의 4 discrete state를 continuous cell-specific coupling factor kappa와 decoupling factor delta로 일반화한다.
multi-sample cVAE로 batch correction과 velocity inference를 post hoc chaining 없이 함께 수행한다.
Bayesian differential test와 in silico perturbation으로 driver dynamics와 TF perturbation effect를 탐색할 수 있다.
key_results: RNA-only benchmark: 10 datasets에서 6 baseline 대비 latent time correlation, GCBDir, Mann-Whitney U가 전반적으로 우위 (core.md Executive Summary/Fig. 2f).
EB 7-day human embryoid body dataset에서 NANOG+ root 및 3 germ layer trajectory 회복 (core.md Executive Summary/Fig. 3a).
HSPC 두 batch 통합에서 scVI/Scanorama 대비 biological conservation 우위 (core.md Executive Summary/Fig. 4d-e).
Macrophage vs DC differential dynamics에서 Bayes factor + GP 기반 검정으로 driver gene 식별 (core.md Executive Summary/Fig. 6).
SPI1/GATA1 KO in silico perturbation 지원 (core.md Executive Summary/Fig. 7).
limitations: 저자 명시: mature/quiescent cell type에서는 unspliced/spliced RNA quality 때문에 velocity inference 신뢰도 저하 가능 (lens-academic.md).
저자 명시: de novo training 의존, atlas-level pre-trained parameters 부재 (lens-academic.md).
저자 명시: 개별 cis-regulatory element 직접 modeling 부재, gene-level c aggregation 한계가 peer review에서도 지적됨 (lens-academic.md).
해석: Bayesian differential test의 realized FDR calibration과 hyperparameter sensitivity가 부족하다.
해석: in silico perturbation은 wet-lab ground truth 검증 없이 기존 biology와의 consistency 중심이다.
follow_up: MultiVelo discrete state와 MultiVeloVAE delta/kappa threshold의 confusion matrix를 우리 HSPC에서 작성한다.
Bayesian differential test의 FDR calibration을 known null/housekeeping genes 또는 permutation으로 검증한다.
multi-donor HSPC에서 cVAE batch regularization이 biology를 과도하게 동질화하지 않는지 테스트한다.

title: Multi-omic relay velocity modeling uncovers dynamic chromatin-transcription regulation across cell states
topic_relevance: post-MultiVelo extension의 다른 갈래. latent time-free relay velocity와 cell-specific kinetic parameter로 chromatin-transcription lag를 정량해 우리 epigenomic-lag outcome과 직접 맞닿는다.
research_question: fixed gene label과 global/gene-specific latent time에 기대지 않고, local relay velocity와 chromatin-aware DNN으로 cell-specific chromatin-transcription kinetics를 추정할 수 있는가?
method: cellDancer-style relay velocity + two DNN heads for chromatin/RNA kinetics; no latent time during training; Mahalanobis neighbor displacement cosine loss; opening/closing k scenario lower-loss selection; downstream DTW c-s lag, m1/m2, DAC score.
main_claims: latent time-free local relay velocity avoids MultiVelo gene-specific latent time over-correction and preserves negative chromatin-RNA lag signals.
cell-specific kinetic parameters capture transcriptional heterogeneity across cell states better than shared ODE regimes.
MoFlow outperforms MultiVelo, cellDancer, scVelo on CBDir across four reused multiome datasets.
key_results: Human brain cortex: CBDir 0.362 vs MultiVelo 0.211, cellDancer -0.015, scVelo 0.211 (core.md Executive Summary/Supp Table 1).
Mouse skin: CBDir 0.144 vs MultiVelo 0.115, cellDancer 0.026, scVelo 0.005 (core.md Executive Summary).
10x embryonic mouse brain: CBDir 0.535 vs MultiVelo 0.155, cellDancer 0.132, scVelo 0.273 (core.md Executive Summary).
Human HSPC: CBDir 0.191 vs MultiVelo 0.063, cellDancer -0.056, scVelo -0.103 (core.md Executive Summary).
Fig. 7: c-s negative lag mechanisms split into rapid RNA turnover/export and nuclear-compartment-sequestered RNA conditional export interpretation (core.md Executive Summary).
limitations: 저자 명시: long-range enhancer-promoter interaction, transcriptional memory, motif-level regulation 직접 modeling 부재 (lens-academic.md).
저자 명시: gene-wise inference라 pathway-level coordination 탐지 제한 (lens-academic.md).
저자 명시: HSPC reconstruction이 all branches에서 완전 일관되지는 않음 (lens-academic.md).
해석: benchmark가 CBDir 단일 metric에 크게 의존하고 ablation이 부족하다.
해석: multi-sample integration, Bayesian differential test, RNA-only mixed mode, uncertainty estimate가 없다.
검토필요: code license가 paper에 명시되지 않아 GitHub 확인 필요.
follow_up: 같은 HSPC input에서 MoFlow와 MultiVeloVAE를 CBDir/GCBDir/runtime/memory/score concordance로 head-to-head 비교한다.
MoFlow hard k selection을 soft posterior 또는 Gumbel-softmax로 바꿔 uncertainty를 평가하는 후속 아이디어를 검토한다.
cluster 10 polycomb/speckle RNA conditional export hypothesis를 MALAT1/XIST 제외 후 재검증한다.

title: A relay velocity model infers cell-dependent RNA velocity
topic_relevance: MoFlow의 relay velocity predecessor. chromatin은 직접 다루지 않지만 latent time-free local velocity 계보를 설명한다.
research_question: multi-stage/multi-lineage scRNA-seq에서 universal kinetic rate assumption 없이 cell-specific RNA velocity kinetics를 추정할 수 있는가?
method: DNN-based relay velocity; local neighbor displacement로 cell-specific transcription/splicing/degradation rates를 학습.
main_claims: local relay velocity로 cell-dependent RNA velocity kinetics를 추정한다.
multiple kinetic regimes, dropout, sparse data, multi-lineage transition에서 기존 RNA velocity 한계를 완화한다.
key_results: Nature abstract 기준 simulation, erythroid maturation, hippocampus development, mouse pancreas에서 성능/biological interpretability를 제시.
limitations: chromatin/ATAC modality 없음.
해석: neighbor graph quality와 gene-wise DNN training sensitivity 검토 필요.
검토필요: PDF figure/table 정밀 분석 필요.
follow_up: MoFlow 성능 향상이 relay velocity 계승 때문인지 chromatin modality 추가 때문인지 분리하는 ablation 설계.
evidence_sources: analysis/epigenomic-lag/li-2023-celldancer/li-2023-celldancer_core.md (494L; §Introduction p2 latent time-free cosine loss, §Discussion p9 multi-omic future direction)

title: mmVelo: A deep generative model for estimating cell state-dependent dynamics across multiple modalities
topic_relevance: single-peak chromatin velocity를 제시해 세 기존 multiome velocity paper의 gene-level chromatin aggregation 한계를 직접 보완할 후보.
research_question: RNA velocity-derived cell-state dynamics를 chromatin accessibility와 같은 regulome modality로 확장해 peak-level chromatin dynamics를 추정할 수 있는가?
method: deep generative multimodal velocity model; RNA dynamics + multimodal representation learning으로 chromatin accessibility dynamics를 single-peak resolution에서 추정.
main_claims: cross-modal generation으로 missing modality dynamics를 추론한다.
chromatin accessibility regulation에 중요한 TF를 식별할 수 있다.
key_results: Abstract 기준 developing mouse brain에서 chromatin accessibility dynamics accuracy를 평가, mouse skin에서 chromatin regulation TF를 식별, human brain development에서 missing modality dynamics를 추론.
limitations: preprint로 peer review 전 결과.
검토필요: PDF, code, benchmark metric, validation details 확인 필요.
해석: peak-level velocity가 enhancer causal kinetics를 의미하는지 perturbation validation 필요.
follow_up: MultiVeloVAE/MoFlow gene-level lag와 mmVelo peak-level chromatin velocity를 같은 dataset에서 비교.
evidence_sources: analysis/epigenomic-lag/nomura-2024-mmvelo/nomura-2024-mmvelo_core.md (361L; PDF p.1 Abstract, p.2 §1 MultiVelo gene-level aggregation 인용, p.3 §2.1, p.4 §2.2-2.3 Neurod2 Fig 2c-e + SHARE-seq Fig S3j-m, p.6 §2.4 101644 TF-peak, p.13-14 §5.4-5.5 chromatin velocity 정의, p.23 §10.3 code/license)
preprint_caveat: bioRxiv v1 2024-12-17, peer-review 출간 모니터링 필요

title: DeepVelo: deep learning extends RNA velocity to multi-lineage systems with cell-specific kinetics
topic_relevance: cell-specific kinetics rationale를 제공하는 RNA-only method. MultiVeloVAE/MoFlow의 배경 reference.
research_question: complex multi-lineage scRNA-seq에서 cell-agnostic kinetic rate assumption을 완화해 velocity inference를 개선할 수 있는가?
method: GCN/deep-learning RNA velocity with gene/cell-specific kinetics.
main_claims: cell-specific kinetics가 multi-lineage/time-dependent dynamics에서 기존 RNA velocity보다 적합하다.
driver gene identification과 complex differentiation trajectory inference를 개선한다.
key_results: Springer page 기준 여러 developmental/pathological datasets에서 더 consistent한 velocity와 driver gene signal을 제시.
limitations: chromatin modality 없음.
해석: kinetic rate biochemical validation과 graph/hyperparameter sensitivity 검토 필요.
검토필요: PDF figure/table 정밀 분석 필요.
follow_up: MoFlow/MultiVeloVAE의 cell-specific kinetics 필요성을 설명하는 background citation으로 사용.
evidence_sources: analysis/epigenomic-lag/cui-2024-deepvelo/cui-2024-deepvelo_core.md (552L; §Background p2 cell-agnostic 한계, §DeepVelo model p3 GCN+continuity, Eq.3-4 model, Eq.14 continuity loss, §Implementation p24)

title: DeepKINET: a deep generative model for estimating single-cell RNA splicing and degradation rates
topic_relevance: chromatin은 직접 다루지 않지만 scEU-seq/scNT-seq metabolic labeling 기반 kinetic-rate validation reference로 Week2 validation gap을 보완한다.
research_question: scRNA-seq에서 single-cell splicing/degradation rates를 추정하고 metabolic labeling data로 kinetic-rate accuracy를 평가할 수 있는가?
method: VAE latent cell state + RNA velocity를 먼저 학습하고, fixed latent representation에서 splicing/degradation rate decoders를 학습.
main_claims: simulation과 metabolic labeling benchmark에서 cellDancer/DeepVelo 대비 kinetic-rate estimation을 개선한다.
key_results: Springer page 기준 scEU-seq PULSE/CHASE와 scNT-seq hematopoiesis에서 Dynamo-derived rates와 비교해 validation을 수행.
DeepKINET은 degradation rate accuracy에서 cellDancer/DeepVelo보다 우수하고 splicing rate는 comparable하다고 보고.
limitations: chromatin modality 없음.
metabolic labeling/Dynamo-derived rate도 완전한 ground truth는 아님.
epigenomic lag validation으로 직접 전이하려면 별도 multiome/time-stamped validation 필요.
follow_up: epigenomic-lag method validation에 metabolic labeling 또는 time-stamped benchmark concept을 차용.
evidence_sources: analysis/epigenomic-lag/mizukoshi-2024-deepkinet/mizukoshi-2024-deepkinet_core.md (383L; §Methods Stage 1 p.13-14 + Stage 2 p.14, Eq.1-2, Fig 2b-c SERGIO, Fig 3b scEU-seq PULSE 100회 box plot, Fig S3c scNT-seq, Discussion p.12 MultiVelo 인용)
week2_role: in-house validation framework reference (C8 transferability map 1차 source)
